title: May 2025 Catch Limit Review
body: " Notification  All vessels:     Stock by Area April 2025 May 2025     Undulate Ray – 7de 2.0t Monthly Closed       There are no catch limit changes proposed for May. Since the last catch limit review, we have changed the following catch limits due to requests from industry:  Overview of Catch limit Changes  Under-10 meter vessels     Stock by Area April 2025 16 April 2025     Sole - 7e   1.0t  1.5t      If you have any concerns or suggested changes, please contact us using the details below:  Katie James: 07747638655  Jacob Bestwick: 07469443840  inshorequotamanager@marinemanagement.org.uk "
